fanout_capacity.model: independent fan-out/fan-in: all bundle queries for an event share bindings/reference_time and can run in parallel

query_shape_notes.event_bundle_dependency: The 65 bundle queries for one event are independent; they use the same event bindings/reference_time and fan in only when the scoring app needs the combined feature vector.
query_shape_notes.group_c_timestamp_filter: v15 applies both p.event_date >= cutoff and d.jms_timestamp >= cutoff on runtime Group C joins
query_shape_notes.payment_join_key_source: risk_profile_token is modeled as <sessionID>:<interactionID>; parsed_interaction_id contains the suffix used for the join
query_shape_notes.account_hash_population: check_bank_account_number_sha512 is populated only for ACH/check rows with routing numbers
